source_pr.title: planner/core: migrate test-infra to testify for integration_test.go
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28412

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: require.False(t, tk.MustUseIndex("select a from t order by a", "i_a")) (planner/core/integration_test.go)
failure_signature: require.False(t, tk.MustUseIndex("select a from t order by a", "i_a")) (planner/core/integration_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: This PR is a test-infra migration: it converts `planner/core/integration_test.go` (and related testdata) from gocheck to standard `testing` with `testify/require`, and migrates the suite testdata helpers accordingly. The change is primarily about modernizing/standardizing the test framework rather than changing planner behavior, so it is classified as `test_infra_migration`.
fix_pattern: Migrate gocheck-based tests to `testing` + `testify/require`, and align testdata/testkit helpers with the new test framework.

evidence: evidence: require.False(t, tk.MustUseIndex("select a from t order by a", "i_a")) (planner/core/integration_test.go)
